hooks.command: python -m pytest scripts/test_execute.py -q 2>&1; if [ -f server/package.json ]; then (cd server && npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run build 2>&1 && npm run test 2>&1); fi; if [ -f mobile/package.json ]; then (cd mobile && npm test 2>&1); fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: 위험한 명령어가 감지되었습니다.' >&2; exit 1; fi
